date_of_birth.description: Patient's date of birth, format YYYY-MM-DD

sin.description: Patient's Social Insurance Number — not in clinical records, physician must enter

diagnosis_code.description: Primary ICD-10 diagnosis code for the claimed disability

diagnosis_description.description: Plain-language description of the primary diagnosis

marked_restriction_walking.description: True if patient has a marked restriction in walking

marked_restriction_mental.description: True if patient has a marked restriction in mental functions

life_sustaining_therapy.description: True if patient requires life-sustaining therapy

duration_years.description: Number of years the impairment has lasted or is expected to last

certifying_practitioner_name.description: Full name of the certifying physician

certifying_practitioner_cpso.description: CPSO registration number of the certifying physician — not in FHIR, physician must enter

certification_date.description: Date the form is being certified, format YYYY-MM-DD
